results.matched_effect_cluster: Beyond Majority Voting LLM Aggregation OW+ISP
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Beyond Majority Voting aggregation algorithms IS the 32-house bearing-aggregator with higher-order voting.
EXACT TWIN — Token-level round-robin sequential interleaved generation IS the watch-rotation crew coordination paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Voting-based council with coordinator aggregating specialist agents IS the helmsman + bearing-reports mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — 2026 consensus protocols incl. voting + thresholding + watch-change-on-conflict IS the HOKULEA conflict-triggered crew rotation.
EXACT TWIN — Structured agent distillation segmenting reasoning + action spans IS the apprentice-distillation of master's bearing-distillation behavior.
Survey of multi-agent collaboration with role-based + blackboards covers the multi-cue specialist + shared-blackboard paradigm.
Self-organizing LLM agents with autonomous role-selection + sequential observation IS the watch-change agent role re-assignment paradigm.
On-policy distillation matching RL reasoning performance IS the apprentice-imitation channel for capability transmission.
